args: $base=Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE '.cursor\extensions'; $ext=Get-ChildItem -Path $base -Directory -Filter 'ketho.wow-api-*' | Sort-Object Name -Descending | Select-Object -First 1; if(-not $ext){throw 'ketho.wow-api extension not found under .cursor/extensions'}; $env:WOW_API_EXT_PATH=$ext.FullName; npx -y wow-api-mcp
